rationale: As a web3/crypto dashboard serving as a 'mission control' for a multi-agent AI verification pipeline, it requires absolute authority, clarity, and truth. The Swiss & High-Contrast archetype ensures maximum legibility and functional focus. The dark theme leverages the existing app's colors (#0f1825, #1a2332) while upgrading the default teal to a sharper, more objective Azure Blue and pure functional semantic colors (Emerald/Red/Amber) for absolute clarity in consensus states.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind scale: p-4 for dense widgets, p-6 or p-8 for main sections to give breathing room inside structural boxes.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-sm (max 4px) for sharp, technical, and objective feel. Avoid pill-shapes or large radii.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment; left-align data and metrics, use structural alignment for the pipeline visualizer to build tension and symmetry.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#1a2332), 1px solid border (#334155), no shadow. On hover: border color brightens to primary or semantic state.
surface_strategies.active_agents: Use 'The Tracing Beam' or a pulsing border (ring-1 ring-primary) concept for agents currently in 'running' state to signify live AI processing.
surface_strategies.glass_elements: Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1a2332]/70) only for sticky headers, maintaining a 1px bottom border.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and interactive cards must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#243043] hover:text-white). Focus states must use ring-2 ring-primary.
motion_and_interactions.pipeline_animation: Use SVG paths with stroke-dashoffset animation or Framer Motion to visualize data packets flowing from the 3 Agent Cards to the Consensus Oracle.
motion_and_interactions.state_transitions: Agents transition smoothly: Idle (slate) -> Running (pulsing primary border) -> Passed (emerald) / Failed (red).

components.buttons: Shadcn buttons heavily customized. Sharp corners (rounded-sm). Primary buttons use Azure Blue.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs. Background #0f1825, border #334155. Focus state is critical for accessibility.
components.tables: Shadcn table for Ceremony History. Left-aligned data. Use Monospace font for blockchain hashes. Badges for status.
components.badges: Square badges (rounded-sm) for Agent Status and Oracle Consensus. High-contrast text.

icons.instruction: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone or Regular) for a technical, crisp look. Ensure it is installed via yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.

visual_pipeline_spec.description: The Multi-Agent Pipeline visualization is the hero of this dashboard.
visual_pipeline_spec.layout: Agents (Verifier, Witness, Sealer) should be laid out structurally (e.g., stacked vertically on the left or in a row), with animated SVG connection lines merging into the large Consensus Oracle node.
visual_pipeline_spec.agent_card: Shows Agent Name, current status badge (Idle, Running, Passed, Failed), confidence score (progress bar or metric), and live logs.
visual_pipeline_spec.consensus_oracle: A larger, central or culminating card showing the '2-of-3' vote tally (e.g., 2 Passed, 1 Failed -> Approved). Displays the final Blockchain Seal and Hash when complete.

background_textures.description: Dark abstract tech nodes, use with opacity-10 or blend-screen in the background of the Consensus Oracle container to give a deep web3 feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against #1a2332 and #0f1825 meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Semantic colors (Red/Green) must be legible against dark slate.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='ceremony-form-submit', data-testid='agent-verifier-status', data-testid='consensus-verdict').

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with .js files (no .tsx) and install Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI primitives, Framer Motion, and @phosphor-icons/react.
Apply the color palette strictly to tailwind.config.js, overriding the default Shadcn styles. Inject fonts: Chivo (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), Azeret Mono (mono).
Build the 'Control Room' layout: Dashboard header navigation and a dense main grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6).
Create the 'Ceremony Initiation Form' widget with document/signer inputs (data-testid included).
Build the core 'Multi-Agent Pipeline' visualizer. Implement the Agent Cards (Verifier, Witness, Sealer) with dynamic states: Idle, Running, Passed/Failed.
Draw SVG connection lines linking the Agents to the Consensus Oracle. Animate the stroke to simulate data flow when agents are running or finished.
Build the 'Consensus Oracle' component that tallies the 2-of-3 votes, calculating the final verdict, and displaying the Blockchain Seal and hash (using Azeret Mono font).
Add a 'Ceremony History' table below the visualizer using Shadcn Table component.
Ensure sharp UI corners (rounded-sm) and use pure borders to define sections, avoiding soft shadows.
